contentBlocks.original:
ॐ असतो मा सद्गमय
तमसो मा ज्योतिर्गमय
मृत्योर्मा अमृतं गमय
ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्तिः
contentBlocks.transliteration:
oṃ asato mā sadgamaya
tamaso mā jyotirgamaya
mṛtyormā amṛtaṃ gamaya
oṃ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ
contentBlocks.translation:
Om, Lead me from the unreal to the real,
Lead me from darkness to light,
Lead me from death to immortality.
Om, May peace be, may peace be, may peace be.
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐ (oṃ) – Om; असतः (asataḥ) – from the unreal; मा (mā) – do not; सत् (sat) – the real; गमय (gamaya) – lead; तमसः (tamaso) – from darkness; मा (mā) – do not; ज्योतिः (jyotiḥ) – light; गमय (gamaya) – lead; मृत्योः (mṛtyoḥ) – from death; मा (mā) – do not; अमृतम् (amṛtam) – immortality; गमय (gamaya) – lead; ॐ (oṃ) – Om; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace;
